evals.prompt: Implement T-305: thêm endpoint GET /api/notifications cho user. BE layer, NestJS.
evals.expected_output: Claude reads PROGRESS.md, TASKS.md, BUGS.md first. Reports session status. Classifies as F1. Runs pre-flight — checks TASKS.md entry, REQUIREMENTS.md FR, DATA_MODEL.md, API_CONTRACT.md. Blocks if API_CONTRACT not updated yet.
assertions: reports session status with task/bug/milestone info
blocks coding if API_CONTRACT missing endpoint spec

evals.prompt: Sửa bug: change password form không validate min length. Fix luôn đi.
evals.expected_output: Claude runs code-match-spec test against REQUIREMENTS.md before classifying. If spec says min 8 chars and user wants to relax to 5, classifies as F2 (change request), NOT F3. Asks user to confirm flow before proceeding.
assertions: reads REQUIREMENTS.md to check spec before classifying as bug
does NOT blindly classify as F3 from keyword 'sửa bug'
asks user to confirm F2 vs F3 if ambiguous

evals.prompt: Thêm ProfileCard component vào trang profile. UI change.
evals.expected_output: Claude reports session status. Classifies F1 (FE layer). Pre-flight checks DESIGN_SYSTEM.md for component spec — if missing, BLOCKS and says must add spec to DESIGN_SYSTEM.md first.
assertions: checks DESIGN_SYSTEM.md in pre-flight for new UI component
blocks coding if component spec not in DESIGN_SYSTEM.md
reads UI_DESIGN.md to understand screen context
